title: Party Warehouse - 50 Clear Plastic Round 16oz (450ml) Containers and 50 Lids - Microwave and Freezer Safe - Recyclable - Great for Takeaways and all Food Storage (50 Deli Pots & 50 Lids)
features: MICROWAVE AND FREEZER SAFE - Perfect for meal prep in advance. Simply freeze your meals in these convenient containers and when ready to eat, pop the lid off and microwave until it reaches your desired temperature.
VERSATILE - Great for takeaways, BBQs, picnics, office lunches, tea parties and almost any occasion.
REUSABLE AND RECYCLABLE - These microwave containers can be used once and then recycled responsibly or can be washed and reused many times over.
SPACE SAVING - The containers and lids stack neatly when not in use and are great for organising your fridge, freezer and larder
FOOD SAFE- Safety is our priority at Party Warehouse, our microwave safe mealprep food containers are made from bpa free plastics.
description: Keep your kitchen organised with this pack of 50 x 16oz (450ml) transparent round containers with 50 separate durable lids. Fantastic for batch cooking and meal prep, these deli tubs will hold portions of soup, sauces, and gravy. Additionally, the pots are freezer safe and microwave safe, so freeze your favourite foods in them and when you are ready to eat, pop the lid off and place in the microwave until the food is hot. These tubs are also great for takeaways and delis to package soups and other foods. The clear lids close securely and with ease. There is a lip at the edge of the lid to allow for comfortable and mess-free opening. The containers are re-usable and can be recycled with your other plastic recyclable waste. From batch cooking to pantry organisation these food safe containers are simply a must.
